Work & Payouts

Pay work. Keep proof.

Fund a payout on Vara, close it on-chain, and share a polished record anyone can verify.

Freelance launch design

420 TVARA

Use cases

Designed for real payment proof

Keep the blockchain details behind the scenes until someone needs to verify the payment.

Freelance

Pay a contractor and share a clean proof record.

Bounty

Reward contributors with a verifiable on-chain record.

Salary

Create salary payment proof that can be shared later.

How it works

Create the payout, fund it with attached value, then close the record.

The proof page is public, shareable, and linked to the explorer reference stored by the contract.
